title: BestDonutHomes
description: Adds homes that players can teleport to.
body:
DonutHome - A comprehensive home management plugin designed for modern Minecraft servers, featuring an elegant GUI interface with centered bed slots for intuitive navigation and visual appeal.

Features:

GUI-based home system with perfectly centered bed slots for professional appearance
Set up to 5 homes with permission-based rank limits (donuthome.homes.1-5)
Smooth teleportation with visual countdown timers and immersive sound effects
Robust SQLite/MySQL database storage for persistent data across server restarts
Smart movement cancellation to prevent teleportation abuse during countdown
Auto-detection of empty home slots with intelligent /sethome command
Folia compatibility for optimal performance on modern server architectures
Complete customization through extensive configuration system
Human-like code structure without comments for professional appearance
Commands:

/home - Open GUI interface or teleport to specific home number
/sethome [number] - Set a new home with automatic empty slot detection
/delhome <number> - Delete existing home with confirmation GUI
/donuthome reload - Reload configuration with admin permission check
Permissions:

donuthome.homes.1-5 - Progressive home limits based on player rank
donuthome.admin - Administrative commands and configuration access
Perfect for survival servers seeking a professional, feature-rich home system with database integration, smooth animations, and comprehensive admin controls. The plugin offers enterprise-grade reliability while maintaining user-friendly interface design.
